modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with mass email requests in Banner Communication Management

full_description_text:  
User wants to create mass emails in Banner. They need help with setting up mailings. Also, they mentioned recurring emails for communication. There seems to be confusion on how to send these emails through the system.
short_description: Issues with mass email requests in Banner Communication Management
description: User wants to create mass emails in Banner. They need help with setting up mailings. Also, they mentioned recurring emails for communication. There seems to be confusion on how to send these emails through the system.
